programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid informs Jean he has been given a temporary promotion at work, but she soon begins to doubt what he says. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean worries about strange noises coming from next door. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in tow

programme.title: Carry On Cruising (1962)
programme.desc: The captain of a cruise ship bound for the Mediterranean is less than impressed when five of his regular shipmates are replaced at the last minute. Despite their best efforts to earn his respect and an eagerness to please, the new recruits seem doomed to cause chaos whatever they do. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Liz Fraser and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The murder of a babysitter throws up a number of questions for Lewis and Hathaway - was she the intended victim or was the killer targeting her employers? Was the crime calculated or opportunistic? And why was she elaborately tied up after being murdered? As the detectives dig for clues, they are led into a world of suburban swinging and fetish photography, far removed from the Oxford they know. Gary Kemp (The Krays), Lucy Cohu (The Awakening), Ciaran McMenamin (Primeval) and Georgia Taylor (Casualty) guest star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Phyllis Logan, and featuring Toby Jones' first appearance in a recurring role as pathologist Dan Peterson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Travellers descend on the sleepy village of Martyr Warren, antagonising local magistrate Hector Bridges, whose subsequent death by shooting brings matters to a head in dramatic fashion. Barnaby and Troy's investigation uncovers the victim has a history with one of the travellers - but revelations that he terrorised his family suggest that the killer may be closer to home

programme.title: Van Der Valk
programme.desc: Marc Warren steps into the shoes of Barry Foster to take on the role of Dutch detective Van der Valk in this updated adaptation of the Amsterdam-based crime drama. Two seemingly unrelated men are found murdered in different parts of the city on the same day. Are the deaths connected, and if so, could there be a link to the disappearance of a student activist? Commissaris Van der Valk must uncover the truth while also dealing with an over-eager rookie cop joining his tight-knit team. Maimie McCoy, Luke Allen-Gale and Elliot Barnes Worrell co-star

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. A professional hitman bursts into the luxurious family home of accountant Keith Rothwell and shoots him in cold blood. Banks is instantly struck by the strange reactions of the victim's family and evidence comes to light that Rothwell has been living a secret double life. Now investigating the murder of a victim with two identities, Banks and Morton discover a possible link to a major money-laundering operation and are plunged into a high-profile fraud investigation with political ramifications

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Pamela Jefferies in a coma following her vicious attack, Banks becomes more determined to find Rothwell's killer. Convinced a vital clue is staring him in the face, he resolves to learn more about Keith Rothwell and, against orders, questions MP Martin Fleming, putting him on a collision course with rival DCI Burgess. Meanwhile, the return of Tom Rothwell to the UK presents Helen with another suspect and an opportunity to put pressure on his family. With Patrick Baladi

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Frustrated that a number of cases have been knocked back by the Crown Prosecution Service, Banks and the team are called on to investigate the murder of teenager Ellie Clayton, daughter of a high-profile internet entrepreneur. The victim's background, together with the suggestion she may have been raped, means the incident is soon the subject of much media speculation, and strong evidence implicates a theatre director who ran a drama workshop the girl attended on the night she died. The detective believes he has found his man, but Morton fears her colleague isn't seeing the bigger picture

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is very surprised to find a well under his house. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in order

With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A reclusive lodger's strange behaviour sends his landlady running to Holmes for advice - and what initially seems to be a simple matter turns into a mystery involving an Italian secret society and murder in New York. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A sergeant is injured in a shooting incident and names his informant as the person responsible. However, the suspected man's girlfriend insists that the officer is corrupt and steals away to be with her lover, who has gone into hiding. Lynda La Plante guest stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon finds himself teetering between two women racing drivers - who are rivals in love as well as on the track. Adventure, guest starring Kate O'Mara

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of day one of the Cambridgeshire meeting, including the 3.00 Tattersalls Stakes and the 3.35 Rose Bowl. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Natalie Green, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Featuring George Best, Zaire's 1974 World Cup campaign and a selection of own goals

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A mentally unbalanced criminal sets out in search of vengeance for the death of his brother and frames Harry for murder. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A security guard is murdered during a payroll snatch, and Regan and Carter are called in to support local investigating officers. However, bad blood between the maverick detective inspector and the force's chief superintendent going back several years manifests itself in an old allegation of corruption being rekindled. Richard Griffiths features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman in the final episode of the crime drama

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which a team of five friends who go fishing together answers questions about top 10 lists then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: King of the Roads

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Avengers

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: Football Rivalries
programme.desc: Featuring Manchester United and Liverpool

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry finds his family being threatened after he agrees to guard a visiting Middle Eastern president in London. Hannah Gordon guest stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter stake out a dodgy garage, believed to be the base of a criminal gang. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star in the first episode of the crime-busting drama, with Ian Hendry, Brian Blessed and June Brown

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five called Young's Offenders answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge. Then they try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Patrick Baladi, Vicky Williamson, John Craven and Kevin Eldon pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Cop Land (1997)
programme.desc: A naive, half-deaf man who longed to be a police officer instead becomes the sheriff of a small town that has become a safe community for New York cops. Thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro

programme.title: Lethal Weapon

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020

programme.desc: James Haydon presents highlights of all three races in the fourth round of the campaign from Snetterton. Glenn Irwin of Honda Racing was top of the standings after the opening three races and was looking to extend his lead

programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are joined by Frankie Dettori ahead of an afternoon of racing at Newmarket, plus the countdown to the Arc in eight days' time.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights

programme.title: World Cup Rivalries: England v Argentina
programme.desc: Short sports film about this compelling sporting rivalry.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the 3.35 bet365 Cambridgeshire (Heritage Handicap) from Newmarket, which follows races at 1.50, 2.25 and 3.00. Plus, races at 2.05 and 2.400 at Haydock Park and 3.15 at The Curragh. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Oli Bell, Matt Chapman and Sally Ann Grassick, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In Fiji's South Pacific paradise, people are coming under attack. Plunging off the beaten track into the remote mountains of the island's interior, freshwater detective Jeremy battles tropical storms and unforgiving jungles in an all-out search for victims, clues, and culprits. Colourful stories of monstrous fish are woven into the local folklore, but how much of this is fanciful, and how much of it is real?

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Jimmy Bullard and Jamie O'Hara join team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey at Anglers Paradise in Devon, trying to catch ornamental koi carp, blue orfe and golden tench

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Craig Charles continues his mission to create the ultimate smart home, while Georgie Barrat acquires FitBit's latest smart watch, which not only will track a person's workouts but says it can help predict illness and alleviate stress. Ortis Deley recounts the tech story of 1975 - a year that Microsoft got their first gig, Ceefax hit TV screens and, thanks to the humble sandwich toaster, grilled cheese butties became an instant hit in the UK. Plus, Jon Bentley's bags himself an exclusive invite to what is shaping up to be the only major tech expo in 2020 - IFA in Berlin

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The presenter explores the beautiful Trossachs and west of Scotland, a place filled with dramatic scenery and abundant with iconic glens, impressive castles and rare wildlife. Susan begins at the fairy-tale Castle of Inveraray, where she goes behind the scenes with His Grace, the Duke of Argyll, head of Clan Campbell, to reveal some amazing secrets that may not be for the faint hearted. At the picture-perfect Loch Katrine, the comedian gets exclusive access at a world-class feat of Scottish engineering and in Inverawe, discovers the secrets to Scotland's world-famous smoked salmon

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: In the Atlantic's extreme north region, summer is short and food limited. Three of the five Arctic fox cubs have already left home - and time is running out for the remaining two. The two white-tailed eagle chicks have fed well and are now almost the size of their parents. They have out grown their nest, so it's time to take their first flight. For puffins, leaving home means jumping from their cliff top nests 600ft to the ocean below. Further south, in southern Spain's Donana National Park, dung beetles benefit from the rare Retueta horses, while in the UKs shallow coastal waters, sea horses dance, basking sharks gorge and blue sharks scavenge

Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves and Willem Dafoe

programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans

programme.desc: A stand-up comedian fights for success on the brutally unforgiving working men's club scene of 1970s northern England. Drama, starring Maxine Peake, Stephen Graham, Paddy Considine and Tony Pitts, who also wrote the screenplay

programme.title: Daphne (2017)
programme.desc: A hedonistic London thirtysomething chef has her life thrown off balance when she witnesses a violent crime. British drama, starring Emily Beecham, Geraldine James and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971)
programme.desc: A Navy intelligence agent heads to Scotland, where he poses as a marine biologist to investigate the theft of millions of pounds in gold bullion from ships off the British coast. However, the locals counter his enquiries with hostility, especially when he sets his sights on a Greek tycoon, whom he suspects may be operating as a modern-day pirate. Thriller, with Anthony Hopkins, Robert Morley and Jack Hawkins. Based on a novel by Alistair MacLean

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling

programme.title: Carry On Nurse (1959)
programme.desc: The patients on the men's ward of Haven Hospital cause more mayhem for the staff than the rest of the hospital combined, forcing the management to send in a formidable matron to control the situation. Feeling aggrieved by her no-nonsense methods, the chaps decide the time is right to get their own back. Comedy, with Kenneth Williams, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey, Shirley Eaton and Leslie Phillips

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of children's author AA Milne, focusing on how his relationship with his son influenced the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories. The books prove immensely popular in a nation recovering from the trauma of the First World War, but bring the youngster who inspired them uncomfortably into the public eye. Starring Domhnall Gleeson, Margot Robbie and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: 2 Guns (2013)
programme.desc: Two undercover agents - one working for the DEA the other for the Navy - infiltrate a drug cartel, only for the planned sting operation to go disastrously wrong. Both operatives become fugitives and must work together to survive - but both keep their true identity a secret, mistakenly thinking the other is a real criminal. Action adventure, starring Denzel Washington and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Machete Kills (2013)
programme.desc: The relentless Mexican mercenary is hired by the president of the United States for a vitally important mission. A billionaire arms dealer intends to start a nuclear war using a space-based weapon of mass destruction, but defeating his schemes involves a deadly encounter with a murderous master of disguise. Action thriller sequel, starring Danny Trejo and Mel Gibson

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet malfunctions. As woken travelling companions Jim Preston and Aurora Lane fall in love, they are soon on a collision course with more technical problems and a dark secret. Fantasy adventure, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Chris Pratt and Michael Sheen

programme.title: February (2015)
programme.desc: Two girls must battle a mysterious evil force when they get left behind at their boarding school over winter break. Horror, starring Emma Roberts, Kiernan Shipka, Lucy Boynton

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 2 (2013)
programme.desc: A couple previously tormented by paranormal activity discover their nightmares are not over. As more strange events occur, they turn to a group of paranormal investigators for help in uncovering the dark secrets that connect them to the spirit world. Horror sequel, starring Patrick Wilson, Rose Byrne and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly hopes to inspire the students when she takes over as substitute teacher in Barry's chemistry class. Adam accidentally embarrasses Emmy when he is forced to read out a note about her in class, so he enlists Erica's help to become a better friend. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. Beverly finds Erica's college application, in which she praises her mother as her hero, but Erica is far from pleased about it. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkie groom-to-be Jai plans on having a wedding in the sky, neglecting the fact that his fiancee Leanne is terrified of heights

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps a family with six fiercely independent children to bring some order to their lives, in particular, helping the older kids to deal with the death of their father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is excited to work a case with the best detective in the NYPD, Dave Majors - until his colleague shares his intentions to ask Amy out on a date. Rosa's surprising fashion choice causes a stir, and Charles and Gina make an unexpected discovery. Comedy, with Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt begins to worry he is being set up for a fall by one of his superiors, and Peralta is handed the chance to work on an important case. Meanwhile, Jeffords tries to make sure his twins get a place at their chosen school. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Terry Crews

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When the young genius learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a stereotypical child. Meemaw and Dr Sturgis' relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Missy unknowingly becomes Sheldon's test subject when he agrees to help her with her maths homework, while Georgie joins Mary's bible study group to spend more time with a girl he has his eye on

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house. Meanwhile, Joe enjoys hanging out with his nurse, Funches, and wants to find a way to get him to stay with him longer than planned. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed, and Kate is allowed to stay home alone, but she fails to follow the strict rules

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A scary TV movie motivates Barry to beg his father to build an underground bunker for the family, but Murray isn't easily persuaded. Erica and Adam go over the top with lavish Mother's Day gifts for Beverly before bringing important requests to her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the academic year comes to a close, Barry and Erica wonder how they will appear in the school yearbook and pressure Adam, who is on the team producing it, to see the rough layout before it goes to print. Murray is annoyed when Marvin pays a visit to ask for money. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is left looking after Terry's pregnant wife, only for panic to set in when her waters break sooner than expected. A computer outage forces Amy and Charles to process all the paperwork by hand. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In an attempt to solve an international jewel theft case, Peralta and Diaz are forced to work with a pair of Swedish detectives and things get very competitive, very quickly. Santiago and Jeffords offer to help Gina prepare for an examination, and Captain Holt enlists Boyle as his squash partner for an important tournament. Anders Holm and Riki Lindhome guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Georgie is thrilled when Veronica comes to stay at the Coopers' house for a few days. Meemaw and Dr Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Coopers help a broken-hearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Sheldon pressures church members for donations when Mary takes him to work for a day

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is surprised when he bumps into his first love, Dana. Meanwhile, Erica and Barry find out they have nowhere to live on their college campus

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is left home alone when his mother goes away for the weekend with an old school friend, so he decides to take advantage of the situation. After a wild time with the boys ordering items off the internet and raiding the fridge, he wakes up to an unpleasant shock. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Joe Thomas

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will decides to organise one last adventure for his friends before they all go their separate ways, so the gang heads off for a camping trip in the countryside. While Will draws on all his scout training, Jay, Neil and Simon are not prepared for the great outdoors

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Erin and the rest of the gang are excited to attend an outdoor pursuits weekend which aims to bring Protestant and Catholic school kids together as part of a peace initiative

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: New English teacher Ms De Brún (Judith Roddy) arrives at Our Lady Immaculate and the friends immediately find themselves inspired. Meanwhile, Da Gerry attempts to take Ma Mary out on a date to the cinema, where things definitely don't go according to plan, and Sister Michael takes charge of a precious Child of Prague statue. Comedy from writer Lisa McGee, set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland, starring Tommy Tiernan, Tara Lynne O'Neill and Siobhan McSweeney

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy meets a vampire who becomes an unlikely confidant, and Willow encounters a ghostly girl bearing a message from the afterlife. Dawn is attacked by supernatural forces and thinks her mother is trying to contact her, while the survivors of the Trio return to Sunnydale seeking redemption

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Doyle receives a vision of another woman in distress, and when Angel investigates he discovers she is being stalked by a deranged surgeon able to observe her every move

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick brings Morty to a planet containing crystals that show whoever is touching them all the ways they may die, depending on the choices they make in life

programme.title: YOLO: Crystal Fantasy
programme.desc: Sarah and Rachel embark on a Christmas cruise party. But the pair end up shipwrecked on a nearby island when the ship is sunk by a large and rather handsome crocodile

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: Animation about a jellyfish family and their human son. Trouble looms as the city of Walla Walla is gentrified by peanuts

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: After a stressful and exhausting adventure that lasts for some days, Rick and Morty decide to take a break at a spa, where they try out a treatment that removes all their toxins. Unfortunately, the toxins take on a form and a life of their own

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from November 2016, in which the householders direct their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional attentions to The Grand Tour, The X Factor, Planet Earth II, Breaking the Silence Live, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Who Do You Think You Are? and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is left home alone when his mother goes away for the weekend with an old school friend, so he decides to take advantage of the situation. After a wild time with the boys ordering items off the internet and raiding the fridge, he wakes up to an unpleasant shock. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Joe Thomas

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will decides to organise one last adventure for his friends before they all go their separate ways, so the gang heads off for a camping trip in the countryside. While Will draws on all his scout training, Jay, Neil and Simon are not prepared for the great outdoors

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: The Goldbergs

However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentine's Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Andy wants to wow his bride with an alternative, skater-themed wedding, but his fiancee Bobby has always dreamed of being a princess on her big day

programme.title: Supernanny US

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon becomes ill and spends a few days in hospital, he turns into the world's worst patient. His behaviour takes a toll on everyone, and Missy gets a taste of what her life would be like if she didn't have a twin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius tries to build a nuclear reactor to power the neighbourhood. A university cocktail party gets heated when Dr Sturgis' colleague, Dr Linkletter, flirts with Meemaw, and Georgie is heartbroken when he learns Veronica has a boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam offers to join Kate in adopting a vegan diet in the hope that it will bring them closer together - but finds giving up meat much harder than expected

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, but he is still determined to go on a dirt bike excursion despite being in pain. Meanwhile, Don and Adam give out bonuses at work

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica cannot wait to get out of the house as Graduation Day approaches - until it dawns on her how much her mother's affection means to her. Barry's plans for a summer with Lainey turn to dust, while Dana makes an unexpected visit. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meemaw learns more about Dr Sturgis's past and Georgie's desire for cable TV leads to a stand-off between him and George Sr

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job does not go to plan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy suspects Spike has somehow regained the ability to kill humans again and begun creating more vampires. In England, the mysterious hooded killers make an attack against the Watchers' Council. Guest starring singer Aimee Mann

programme.title: Angel

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkie groom-to-be Jai plans on having a wedding in the sky, neglecting the fact that his fiancee Leanne is terrified of heights

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A pagan witch swaps lives with an evangelical pastor who specialises in casting out demons

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps Jennifer and Tim, who adopted twin girls - Mekenna and Alyssa - after spending 15 years struggling to conceive, but their boisterous behaviour is causing issues

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with Cake Week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final Showstopper Challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie Spaceballs, but Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper. When Beverly and Pops come up for parents' weekend at college, Erica plans to tell them about an important decision she has made, but Murray surprises everyone by tagging along

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey moves back to town and Barry invites her to the prom, but when she refuses, he plans a prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going. Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny discovers she has a dedicated group of fans from her Serial Ape-ist days when she accompanies Leonard to a comic-con. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch at Penny's flat, and stress over the baby's arrival prompts Howard to make an impulsive purchase

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, whose actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during December, 2016, including Brits Icon: Robbie Williams, Skeg Vegas, Tattoo Fixers, Planet Earth II, The Big Life Fix, Rillington Place, Fawlty Towers and I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watch in December 2016, including Strictly Come Dancing, Planet Earth II, First Dates, Rillington Place, David Blaine: Beyond Magic, The Big Life Fix with Simon Reeve, When Phillip Met Prince Philip and White Christmas

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: DJ Gordon is looking for a man to share his life with and on paper, kickboxing instructor Stephen seems like the perfect partner. Will they get on in real life? Former ballroom dancer David hopes to sweep Zoe off her feet, Paul and Samantha share a dry wit, and keen baker Holly helps fitness fanatic Ben - who had an awkward meal in the last series - to confront his fear of carbs

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Manchester 'player' Geo is pulling out all the stops in his attempts to impress 19-year-old Heather - he even brings champagne and flowers. But how will she feel after he tells his favourite joke? Clay-pigeon enthusiast Emma seems a good match for finance broker Jeremy - but soon discovers she has to compete with his work phone - while 82-year-old Harvey isn't letting his age get in the way as he tries to win the heart of lifelong singleton Dinah

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Nidderdale agricultural show in the Yorkshire Dales, where she learns how to make her own pork pies and sausages. However, her success jeopardised by problems the evening before the event

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Andrea and Stephen Vincent want to start the next phase of their married life with not one but two new homes, hoping to find a house in Bristol and a second property in Spain

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge takes children Arthur and Dorothy on a mission to rescue baby toads in their chateau grounds. Donna and Paul put the rest of their renovations on hold as they set themselves the challenge of turning a wing of the chateau into a self-contained apartment for Donna's parents, Anne and Brian

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Steve and Hannah, who are self-building a straw-bale house in a woodland glade in East Sussex. The couple have been learning on the job as well as managing on a tight budget, and have found that every setback means more time living in a damp shack that they have called their home for the last two years

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Hazel's Roost in Bainbridge, North Yorkshire, where Lithuanian-raised host Millie Bussey hopes to prove that her establishment offers the best value for money. However, despite being full of praise for the cleanliness of their rooms, some of her guests claim to feel cramped, while others believe the style is too dated

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Rhandregynwen Hall in Llanymynech, Powys, where owner Mark Johanssen's country manor impresses his guests on arrival. However, drawers in need of dusting, an abundance of cobwebs and breakfast blunders dent the host's chances of victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest moves to the Smart and Simple hotel in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, where owner Simon Colbran and his assistant manager Rebecca Heasman want their rivals to agree that the accommodation lives up to its name. The guests are wowed on arrival, but Cathy and her son Alex aren't swept off their feet by their 'dark and corporate' bridal suite

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Cathy Robinson and her son Alex welcome the contestants to the Pearfield Bed and Breakfast in Petersfield, Hampshire, and want to impress them by providing a homely experience. The hosts receive largely positive feedback from their guests, but Millie Bussey manages to find some flaws

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Dagmar the giraffe is supporting her closest herd member Orla, whose new calf is overdue - but at the same time she is reluctant to allow her own youngest to feed properly. So the keepers plan a herd birth in the hope that both mothers can learn from each other. There is concern when two of the spider monkeys withdraw from their family, while two devoted camels experience the trauma of separation when one undergoes an operation

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet newlyweds Nikki and Andy Taylor-Myers in Northampton, who have recently merged households and are unhappy in their cluttered terrace. Property services manager Andy is desperate to stay in their home, but drama and support teacher Nikki has reached boiling point and wants a fresh start

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Arthur race to collect low-hanging fruit to make delicious redcurrant jelly. In south-west France, Donna and Paul are hard at work on their most ambitious project yet, creating a tea room. However, stringent building regulations add to the challenge. Elsewhere, Ithaca and Alex need to raise some cash to help repair their chateau's 300-year-old roof

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Robert and Milla Gaukroger who, when he last saw them, were in danger of their bank foreclosing on their unfinished timber house with views of Lake Windermere. They had begun construction with only a quarter of the £400,000 budget needed, and the physical effort of turning the 1980s property into an eco-home that mirrored the surrounding mountains had begun to put Robert's health at risk

programme.title: A Year in the New Forest
programme.desc: Documentary following a year in the life of the animals and people who call the ancient forest their home. Telling the story of each season as it passes in this rich ecosystem, the series explores a remarkable, precious and traditional way of life. In the New Forest, people and nature must face climate change and the new threats of the 21st century together. As the land cools and the days shorten, the leaves turn golden and one of the great spectacles of the forest begins - the red deer rut

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Bob, 51, is airlifted to St George's after falling 20ft from a ladder while repairing his roof. With debris in his wound, doctors are concerned he could develop a life-threatening infection. Retired pharmacologist Anthony, 68, receives help for a chronic gas problem, while 83-year-old Gladys collapsed on the stairs at home and has a dangerously low heart rate

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The Craggy Island clerics face the prospect of an untimely death during the return flight from a visit to a holy shrine. Jack quickly commandeers the only parachute and bails out, taking the drinks trolley with him - leaving Ted and Dougal to their fate

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Kiri
programme.desc: In the final episode, DI Mercer confronts Nate with new evidence about Kiri's murder, and as the truth about the young girl's disappearance comes to light, Miriam realises she has to take responsibility for her actions. Meanwhile, Alice's devastation gets the better of her, Tobi has a choice to make about his son Nate, and Si realises his relationship with Alice has deteriorated, and he is determined to find out why. Four-part drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, Lucian Msamati, Paapa Essiedu and Felicia Mukasa

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: A man makes a 911 call in South Carolina as he attacks his ex-girlfriend. A shocking call reveals the aftermath of an attack on a baby, and fog suddenly hits the Sheppey Crossing

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Having suffered a close bereavement and realising life is increasingly short, Jo Tweddle and her husband Rich have decided to seize the day and move to somewhere new together. Rich wants to head to north Wales, an area which he loves, while Jo would prefer to move to the hills around the beautiful city of Granada in southern Spain. Jonnie Irwin pulls out all the stops to keep them in beautiful Snowdonia with a budget of £300,000, while Laura Hamilton does everything she can to persuade Rich to buy in Granada with three stunning properties for up to £400,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe and Simon O'Brien modernises a dated Welsh dresser during visits to Whitby and Shipley in Yorkshire

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Rob and Claire Hartley, who are building a large home on their family farm in Bingley, West Yorkshire. The couple are ready to start work on their project when Charlie notices a problem with their design, and sends them back to the drawing board - leaving them with a lot of catching up to do

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of B&B owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Edenmore Guest House in Ardrossan, Ayrshire, where things start well for owner Hugh Begbie when his guests soon make themselves at home. However, a game of curling soon brings out their competitive sides, and a rusty pole causes a stir

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competitors are invited to Grassington Lodge in the market town of Grassington in the Yorkshire Dales, where owner Diane Lowe believes her establishment will impress with its 'little touches'. The guests enjoy their eggs Benedict breakfast and Diane receives some kind comments, but fellow proprietor Hugh takes some convincing that she is not a snob

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jeanette and Andrew Collette open the doors to Manor Farm in Oxfordshire, where the guests seem impressed on arrival - but the peaceful, rural feel doesn't appeal to Elle and Ian Betchley, and self-confessed 'dour' Scotsman Hugh Begbie just wants to be left alone without Jeanette's fussing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ian and Elle Betchley, owners of the George and Dragon Hotel in Princes Risborough, Buckinghamshire, welcome the contestants to their B&B, but some of them are not impressed to discover a stained teapot and dirty rooms. The duo organise an afternoon of ghost-hunting at the nearby Hellfire Caves, however there is a lack of paranormal activity. At breakfast, Diane and Sandra do not rate the eggs Benedict, leaving the hosts with mixed feedback at check-out time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners confront their rivals and discover what they have been paid, and emotions run high as the winner is announced. The host of Edenmore Guest House, Hugh Begbie, deals with criticism of the state of his exterior, Jeanette and Andrew from Manor Farm in Oxfordshire dejectedly analyse why their newfound friends would not stay again, and Elle and Ian Betchley from the George and Dragon in Buckinghamshire tackle Hugh on his hosting score

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Keepers introduce a new male to the spotty chocolate poison dart frog colony, hoping that the competition will result in an increase in tadpoles. Meanwhile, the Sulawesi macaques are ecstatic to welcome a new baby to their family, but their enthusiasm is a cause for concern as new mother Maggie may not be able to protect her baby from the other females

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor, but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: The Strawbridge family heads to the beaches of Saint-Malo with Angel's parents to seek out chateau inspiration. Ithaca and Alex's fundraiser in northern France is a logistical nightmare, but becomes a hot ticket. First impressions are important to Angela and Steve, who get stuck in a last-minute fix as they try to restore their chateau's electric gates before the first rental guests of the season arrive

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits an arch-shaped home made of clay tiles in the Weald of Kent, built by Richard Hawkes, who designed the property, and his wife Sophie. It was intended to be energy self-sufficient and able to supply surplus power to the National Grid, but serious problems occurred when the arch collapsed during construction, so the presenter returns to see if their innovative home has lived up to its promise

programme.title: 23 Cases
programme.desc: An attempt at reconstructing a murder attributed to Rapp leads to the discovery of a young Syrian refugee, Khalil, hiding in a forest at the scene of the crime. He is traumatised, but also in possession of the weapon used in the crime. Rapp follows his own dangerous path in the mystery. Thriller, starring Shadi Hedayati and Franz Dinda. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 68-year-old professional actor visits St George's Hospital after injuring his shoulder while rushing to catch a train, and a check-up indicates he may need corrective surgery to set things right, but further assessment suggests he might be living with a much more serious condition. An octogenarian couple are rushed in to A&E after being knocked over by a motorcyclist while crossing the road, and the police maintain an active presence as paramedics bring in a man who has collapsed after a suspected drug overdose. Plus, an 88-year-old woman with a swollen leg discusses her ill-fated marriage to a much younger man nearly four decades ago

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Pub landlord Tony is brought in with burnt legs as a result of his barbecue gas cylinder exploding - made slightly worse by the fact he was only wearing boxer shorts at the time. Henry, a 93-year-old war veteran, is rushed in with severe breathing difficulties, and builder Bill was knocked unconscious after falling off his shed. His CT scan reveals he has broken his neck in three places, and he may need surgery to avoid damage to his spinal cord

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty takes to the skies above Israel as he joins the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly, and Kate Quilton investigates premium-priced manuka honey, which is marketed for its anti-bacterial properties. Matt Tebbutt visits the UK's largest leek producer, where he's shocked by how much of the vegetable goes to waste, but amazed by a mobile factory on wheels that can process 60,000 leeks a day

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Des and Caline May find their dream property. Des is championing Alton in Hampshire, near friends and family, but Caline believes their future lies in the Valencia region of Spain. Jonnie has a budget of £500,000 to convince Caline to stay in the UK, but it's going to be close as Laura tries to entice Des to Spain with three amazing properties costing up to £350,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton is on the Portuguese island of Madeira, helping house-hunters Sandy and Phil find the perfect holiday home to enjoy with their children and grandchildren

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hull resident Peter and his mum Greta employ the skills of Jonnie Irwin to help find him his dream property in Huelva in Spain on a £150,000 budget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in Hertfordshire, with Phil searching for properties for Rich and Bethan, who have lost out on two homes already. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Chicago-born Lauren and her husband Paul come to terms with the smaller scale of British properties

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Presenter Kevin McCloud revisits a couple in south Devon who decided to renovate two run-down barns. Their plan was to use old English building techniques to create an environmentally friendly family home, complete with an eco-friendly sewage system, using as many recyclable materials as they could incorporate

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring rapper Warren Temple kicks off a week of dinner parties in Peterborough, where he hopes his Spanish-influenced menu will impress his guests - ethical trader Donna Trafford, glamour model Susie Hutson, straight-talking professional Vicki Culverhouse and veterinary nurse Robin Hills - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ethical trader Donna Trafford hosts the second night in Peterborough, and plans to wow her guests with a colourful evening of tasty food and relaxed fun in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in Peterborough, glamour model and columnist Susie Hutson is out to prove she's not the dizzy blonde some of the guests assume she is - and it doesn't take long for ethical trader Donna Trafford and would-be rapper Warren Temple to make an unexpected discovery that proves there's more to Susie than meets the eye

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking businesswomen Vicki Culverhouse hosts the fourth night of the competition in Peterborough. She surprises the group when she unleashes some poetry at the dinner table, after having been very direct with the other diners throughout the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Veterinary nurse Robin Hills is the final host of the competition in Peterborough. He prepares an animal-themed evening, accompanied by well-presented cuisine, which he hopes will be a big hit with his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit Church Spa in East Markham in Nottinghamshire on their second evening, where proprietor Daniel Walker and family friend George Gillespie hope to wow their guests with their relaxing facilities. Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Steve and Lisa Tindall, who own the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex, where they hope their guests will fall for their boutique B&B. They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid night's sleep afterwards

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of 'beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when it's time to count up the cash

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, there's a dramatic mountain rescue for injured climber Richard after a fall of 600 feet. A night on Hart Crag for four campers is called short in the face of huge winds blowing up. And in the Cairngorms, new team member Emma joins a dangerous search for lost walkers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Zaki, 63, recently underwent a tonsillectomy following a diagnosis of throat cancer, but he has come to A&E after suffering a serious bleed. Doctors try to save 10-month-old baby Amy, who stopped breathing at home, while 21-year-old expectant father Craig appears to have had a miraculous escape after a motocross accident, but has he learnt his lesson?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St George's for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into A&E after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: Father Ted

Doctors try to save 10-month-old baby Amy, who stopped breathing at home, while 21-year-old expectant father Craig appears to have had a miraculous escape after a motocross accident, but has he learnt his lesson?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St George's for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into A&E after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal takes over as Craggy Island's new milkman, but his predecessor, local womaniser Pat Mustard, returns to exact an explosive revenge on Ted for getting him sacked. Starring Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan

programme.desc: Coverage of the offbeat event which comes from the Cauberg, a hill in the southern town of Valkenburg, Holland

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May find the fastest way to get around London - bike, boat or car - in a race through the capital during rush hour. The Stig takes to the test track in the Caparo T1, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage Roadster is pitted against a man with three rockets strapped to his back, and Simon Cowell is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets to grips with a Peel P50, the smallest car to go into production, and finds a surprising number of uses for it. James May experiences the luxury of the Rolls-Royce Phantom Drophead Coupe convertible, and the Stig puts the Ferrari 599 GTB Fiorano through its paces on the test track. The Rolling Stones' Ronnie Wood is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures, travelling to Penang, Malaysia, to sample its multifaceted cuisine, which includes Malay, Indian, Chinese and British flavours. He also meets food writer Fay Khoo to explore the popularity of the region's fish-head curry, before crossing the Indian Ocean to Sri Lanka, where he visits a bustling fishing village and takes part in an unusual expedition

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson test-drives two estate cars - the BMW M5 and Mercedes E63. Richard Hammond tries out motor-home racing, while James May pits an Alfa Romeo 159 against a man who crosses the Humber estuary without using its famous bridge. The Stig puts Honda's Civic Type R through its paces and former England rugby union forward Lawrence Dallaglio is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits Palermo in northern Sicily, a city echoing Arab, North African, French, Spanish and Italian influences, making its cuisine unique and irresistible. Pine nuts, raisins, almonds and golden breadcrumbs are combined with flavours of sun-ripened tomatoes, lemons and the finest olive oil to create a range of unforgettable dishes. Rick witnesses locals celebrating a festival in honour of Palermo's patron saint Rosalia, and receives a cookery lesson from a real-life duchess. At home he cooks Marsala chicken, a Sicilian classic served in UK bistros since the 1960s

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A creepy collection of kitsch is the first in a long line of bizarre finds on Frank and Dave's picking trip. Meanwhile, Mike prepares for the shop's grand opening

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack's not having much luck with lights these days, whether it's the fizzling sign at the start of this show, the blackout during his recent Sheffield gig, or the dimly lit area at the start of this seventh series. Lee and Lucy have enjoyed a spot of culture at their local cinema, but the sparkle of a French movie is soon diminished when the romantic walk home finds them in an imposing underpass. She has her handbag stolen by a bunch of cocky youths from under his nose. Given the fact the layabout failed to protect her, or come up with an accurate description of their muggers, Lee feels the urge to prove his manliness, but will a spell at the local boxing ring be a help or a hindrance? Sally Bretton and Katy Wix also star

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A wealthy new couple move into the block and soon find out that sharing a building with Lee and Lucy is anything but straightforward. The fun begins when Lee somehow manages to bag an invitation to a christening party being thrown by the couple - sending him and Lucy on a last-minute gift-buying trip, during which they make every wrong decision humanly possible to find the perfect present for the baby who seems to have everything. Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden join the cast, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Terminator Salvation (2009)
programme.desc: In a future dominated by the deadly robots, resistance leader John Connor fights to stop the creation of an advanced new terminator and searches for the teenager destined to go back in time and become his father. Elsewhere, a mysterious stranger with no memory is about to learn the shocking truth about his origins. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Christian Bale, Sam Worthington and Anton Yelchin
