programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Doon Mackichan, Jimmy Carr, Dara O Briain and Alan Davies wax lyrical on subjects including endings. Comedy panel game, with Stephen Fry awarding points for the answers he finds most interesting.

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: The team examines skulls from the site of the 1499 battle that saw Switzerland win its independence from the Holy Roman Empire, and which changed the nature of medieval warfare

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: The team investigates the origins of a hill fort which was long thought to be Iron Age, but is now believed to be an even older defence against invasion

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Nicholas Day investigates a horrifying discovery made in a Brighton left luggage office in 1934 - which was soon followed by a similar suspicious incident in London

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: How Fiat didn't just make cars, but also made trains, planes and, like modern-day kingmakers, they made and broke governments too

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Walmer Castle in Kent, where the team values a jacket worn by President Kennedy that could be one of the most valuable items ever featured on the series. Other items brought in include an art deco mask that terrifies its owner's children, an enamel advertising sign, and a letter from Lord Nelson that has an unexpected connection to the owner's dead husband

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable to attacks

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Woking to Walton-on-Thames, uncovering the story of Britain's first purpose-built crematorium and visiting Brooklands, the birthplace of motor racing, along the way. As his journey draws to a close, he goes camping and finds out about the unlikely origins of a leisure pursuit that is going strong today

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo starts his latest tour as Hampton Court Palace, where he is treated to a private tour of the Great Vine - the world's longest grapevine - before moving on to stately Claremont House, where tragic circumstances led directly to the birth of the Victorian era. He then moves up the line to Wimbledon and the site of a historic duelling event before ending his journey in Teddington, where he hears the story of a reformer whose work revolutionised the care for those with living disabilities

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second visit in this series to Plas Newydd on the Isle of Anglesey. The team examine rarities including a cabinet with a secret function, a magazine rack made by celebrated designer Piero Fornasetti, a collection of historical items related to deafness, a Chinese silver punchbowl and a photo that has a connection to the Apollo 11 mission

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn visits the architecture of the Stockton & Darlington railway, the first passenger steam line in the world and learns how Essex's enormous Chappel Viaduct was built

programme.title: Deep Wreck Mysteries
programme.desc: The fate of a Canadian warship that went to the aid of an American freighter rocked by an explosion in 1944. More than 60 years on, divers uncover new evidence of the sinking

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment

programme.title: Churchill's Bodyguard
programme.desc: An insight into how the prime minister's life was placed in jeopardy over the north Atlantic, and the moment Walter Thompson saved Churchill on the roof of Downing Street

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: While America had Ford, Chrysler and Buick, Hitler also wanted a car that would transform his nation - the 'people's car', or Volkswagen

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins the final leg in Egham, Surrey, where a historic steam fair offers the original 'white-knuckle' ride. Across town lies the Royal Holloway College, now part of the University of London, where the ex-politician discovers the institution's philanthropic roots. Moving into Berkshire, Portillo drops in at a factory manufacturing a famous sleep-inducing beverage with historic roots. Michael's journey ends at Henley-on-Thames in Oxfordshire, where he learns that rowing in an eight is a challenging business

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on another journey around the nation with a copy of George Bradshaw's Victorian Railway Guidebook to discover how the railways have affected people and what remains of Bradshaw's Britain. He begins by travelling from High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, to Stratford-upon-Avon in Warwickshire, finding out about the remarkable craftsmen behind the Victorian furniture trade, discovering how George Bradshaw helped save Britain's canal heritage and seeing Shakespeare through the eyes of a 19th-century rail tourist

programme.title: Adolf Hitler's War
programme.desc: The Red Army develops strength and Hitler's Spring Offensive is stopped at Stalingrad; and in the largest ghetto the inhabitants' fight back in the Warsaw Uprising

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a car auction business. A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The battle for North Africa, which involved three years of fighting between Rommel's Afrika Korps and Montgomery's Desert Rats and culminated in the Allied victory at El Alamein. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Burton Constable Hall near Hull, which is home to a collection of treasures. Objects brought in to be valued include a ship's anchor that was found in a garden pond, a medal awarded to sailor for helping to recover Captain Scott's ship from the Antarctic in 1901, some 17th-century flat pack furniture, and a flimsy booklet that proved to be a profitable investment

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built

programme.title: Deep Wreck Mysteries

programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the wildlife eking out an existence in and around the scorching wilderness of the Sahara, where only the toughest survive. It's a constant struggle against dehydration, as zebra battle over dwindling rivers, camels search for water and tiny barn swallows navigate thousands of square miles of barren sand to find a life-saving oasis. The naked mole rat avoids the heat by living a subterranean existence, while the silver ant is able to take on the midday sun - but needs a 'spacesuit' to do it

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how the arrival of winter sparks a ruthless battle for survival in the polar regions, with temperatures plummeting to -70C, winds reaching 120mph and day-long darkness. As a blizzard rages, a polar bear treks into the Arctic mountains to give birth, while the entire world population of spectacled eider braves the weather in a giant ice hole. Wolves and bison engage in battle, but alliances are also made, and beneath the snow, voles try to dodge the attacks of great grey owls and weasels

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the life and work of people in the polar regions, including the residents of Norilsk in Siberia, the coldest city on Earth. He also discovers how the Danish armed forces maintain their country's claim to Greenland's natural resources by mounting a 2,000-mile dog sled patrol during the winter, and finds out how a research base at the South Pole is able to cope with being cut off from the outside world for six months at a time

programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Michelle and David from Liverpool search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa del Sol with a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ravin and Pritti from Surrey find a new permanent home for themselves and their family in Gran Canaria, lining up five options within their budget of £180,000

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 10-month-old puppy called Albie is knocked over by a car on a family camping holiday is rushed in as an emergency admission, and Noel Fitzpatrick fears this may be a life or death situation. Elsewhere, a Scottish terrier has a mysterious ailment, and a 16-month-old spaniel, is suffering from severe arthritis affecting both hips

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The edition focuses on the rapidly growing number of 999 calls connected to the over-75s. In Warminster, the emergency services are called to a crash involving three cars, which has left one person with life-changing injuries and was caused by a 75-year-old man who suffered a suspected heart attack at the wheel. PC Phil Bridge is searching Trowbridge to find a 73-year-old woman who is in the latter stages of dementia and has disappeared while out shopping with her son

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Sergeant David 'Podders' Podmore is called out to investigate after a shooting in the Liverpool area, and following a raid at a property, a number of weapons are seized, including a potential improvised explosive device made out of industrial fireworks. Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Housing officer Charmain helps pensioner Mr Holland, a former shipbuilder whose flat is in a state of disrepair and is unable to do the work himself after taking a tumble. Meanwhile, ex-council tenant Max's estate is also undergoing major renovations. But having bought his flat through right-to-buy scheme and paid off his mortgage, the council now has to bill him an enormous £121,000 for his share of the essential, multi-million-pound works. In the pest department, Andy and Wayne tackle a derelict shop over-run with rats

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Artist and social commentator Grayson Perry travels across the pre-pandemic US, spending time with people from all walks of life to explore the divisions across the nation - issues that have since been thrown into sharper focus. He begins in the American South, where he tackles race - arguably the oldest and most intractable division in the US. Travelling from Atlanta, Georgia, to Washington, DC, he explores older ideas of African American success with members of the so-called 'black elite' and reflects on the issue of white privilege

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Before winter arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree take on their next project, transforming a 35-foot long, eight-ton river boat into luxury guest accommodation. While Angel completely overhauls the old nautical interior with bespoke fabrics and unique crafts, Dick has the small task of installing the boat's very own wind turbine and a decking that reaches over the moat

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: With the majority of people under 30 struggling to get on the property ladder, and millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms, young and old are tackling Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. This time, Cairo, who was homeless for several years, leaves his temporary accommodation to stay with 66-year-old in-line skater Bonnie, based in Kensington and Chelsea. Meanwhile, Lucy moves in with Viv and Merv in Norfolk, as the 25-year-old tests out lodging as an alternative to living in a camper van

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor, but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Receptionist Anna Gibbons hosts the first party in Southampton, but her burlesque theme does not go down well with her guests. Food snob Greg Bell criticises Anna's decision to use packet pastry, but designer Darren Miller lightens the mood when he joins in with the evening's pole-dancing entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kitchen designer Darren Miller hosts the second dinner in Southampton, throwing a 1990s rave-themed party. Despite feeling unwell, he ploughs ahead with preparations, but things get off to a bad start when Greg Bell decides to ignore the event's dress code. An unfortunately placed tattoo appears to put the diners off Darren's main course, and a mouldy raspberry found in the dessert looks set to ruin his chance of winning the competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer service adviser Greg Bell hosts the third dinner party of the week in Southampton, determined to educate his guests in the art of fine dining. However, after putting up with two days of constant criticism from the host, his fellow competitors are eager to pounce on any opportunity to mark him down

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dock co-ordinator Tasha Whyte hosts the fourth dinner party in Southampton, hoping her simple menu with fun entertainment will ease the underlying tensions between some of the diners. However, the guests make a surprising discovery when snooping around Tasha's house, which leaves one of them in tears

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tax officer and vegetarian Bijal Mehta hosts the final night of the competition in Southampton, and hopes to create the ultimate meat-free dinner - but some of her guests are disappointed by the menu. Following the meal, the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps a woman from Cornwall with £170,000 to spend to find a holiday home in Funchal, capital of Madeira, a city she has visited repeatedly over the past 10 years

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: After spending 15 years living on a Greek island, Lynne and Peter Evans are back in the UK and hankering after a second home in the sun. Fuerteventura has held a special place in their hearts since they first went there on holiday with their two children, so they think it's the perfect place to buy. Ben Hillman needs all of his property know-how as he shows them five great options for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day arrives, and the hosts of The White Horse Inn, Barnfield B&B, The Black Swan Inn and Delamere Farm all discover just how much their guests valued their services

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien discover items including baby scales, an oil can and a glass cabinet that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie from Staffordshire want a holiday home on the island of Fuerteventura, so Ben Hillman lines up five properties near the coastal town of Caleta de Fuste

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Patsy Emmerson hope to buy a dream holiday home in Gran Canaria for £100,000. They check out a beachside apartment, a country house, a hillside villa and a luxury retreat. Presented by Amanda Lamb

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Vineyard owner Val Thomas comes up with a plan to attract tourists to the Isles of Scilly in the winter - an observatory that takes advantage of the area's clearn night skies. Cornishman Mark Rudge is converting unwanted apples into a decent profit, mussel farmers Barry and Matt Sessions hatch a plan to outwit the seagulls and geologist Kevin Page goes fossil hunting

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 14-year-old is rushed to St George's after falling head first over the handlebars of her bike and hitting her head, and doctors are concerned she may have caused serious damage. Meanwhile, Geoffrey, who is 56, has been urgently transferred from another hospital after a severe infection left him with a compromised airway and struggling to breathe

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with Cake Week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final Showstopper Challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Companion show to baking contest, featuring unseen footage from the programme and an interview with the week's eliminated baker. Plus, comedian and regular contributor Tom Allen invites an array of home-bakers to bravely present him with their delights

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Rough Guide to the Future
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud sends three celebrities, comedians Jon Richardson and Phil Wang and broadcaster Alice Levine, around the world to take a light-hearted look at some of the planet's biggest issues and the technology that could offer solutions, from driverless cars to meat grown in laboratories. In the first episode, Phil travels to China to investigate ways to deal with waste, Jon explores the latest advancements in food production in America, and Alice encounters robots in Japan

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shares his simple take on a butter chicken curry with less spice, fewer ingredients and less washing up, making it the perfect meal for family life. Jamie also takes a salmon en croûte - a showstopper dish normally reserved for impressing at dinner parties - and creates an easy one-pan dish on a bed of greens and encased in golden puff pastry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Languages graduate and vintage clothes collector Lola Oduba hosts the first dinner party in north London, convinced her flair for cooking and sophisticated tastes will ensure her victory. However, the guests are unimpressed with a retro menu of polenta, pork belly and rhubarb pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Francesca Sawyer hosts the second party in north London, but struggles to prepare her menu without the use of a cooker. Armed only with her three mini-ovens, she makes fruit-flavoured vodka jellies, poussin and cupcakes, in the hope this selection will be enough to win the day

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in north London is hosted by DJ Niyi Adelakun. He has to deal with a shed full of chickens, a table made from a door, a fridge that doubles as a wardrobe, and a menu featuring too many courses

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Curtain-maker Joss Woolf holds the fourth dinner party in north London, but finds that her Thai menu receives a mixed response from her guests and the evening's entertainment brings out the worst in Lola. The host also gets a shock when Niyi admits to having a crush on her

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items 'lost' in people's homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they have found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

Prue Leith joins Sandi to set a cookery challenge - they must prepare a chicken pie from her recipe, including acquiring all the ingredients

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Hairdresser Kate Eadon hosts the fourth dinner party in Hastings, East Sussex, with a menu styled on a gourmet pub meal. Adrian Carter gets himself in hot water, Sally-Anne Keller reveals a surprise celebrity crush, and the host recounts her own encounter with a famous funnyman

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire agents try to collect nearly £2,500 in unpaid parking fines, while officers Matt and Garry head to the West Midlands to recover £4,500 owed from a debtor to his former girlfriend. Agents travel to south-east London looking to collect £3,000 owed by a taxi company

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Nick and the team perform a textbook tactical pursuit and containment on a suspected cloned car, and a drunk driver in Bradford attempts to escape the police. Meanwhile, officers look into the case of a hit and run in west Yorkshire

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers chase a car trying to escape the wrong way down the M62, a pursuit which ends in three arrests and the seizure of a van full of potentially stolen generators. Elsewhere in West Yorkshire, the Proactive Intercept Team seize more than £200,000 of unlawfully obtained cash, and in Bradford, officers Nicky and Claire are on hand to get an unsafe Golf off the roads

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Dan Hauser, Laura's former team captain, calls her out of the blue from his prison. Acting on his tip-off, she and Jake visit an old warehouse owned by gangster Thomas Mullens, aka the Irishman, where she finds the bodies of Sarah Price and Gary West, who disappeared after they stole $10million in unmarked currency. However, Laura has not told Santiani about the tip off and finds herself in hot water when her duplicity is discovered after Dan and Mullens escape from their maximum security prison. Laura is taken off the case, but ignores the ban and persuades her team to keep her informed of the manhunt's progress. Debra Messing stars

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: When a media mogul's wife is driven off the road and into a river, the investigation unearths a secret in an old and supposedly closed case. The team investigates a possible revenge attack, and as the woman's husband made plenty of enemies, there is no shortage of suspects

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the body of an elderly woman is found, suspicion turns to her at-home carer and her boyfriend. Evidence quickly begins to suggest the 82-year-old was starved to death, prompting Stone's eye to turn to the victim's granddaughter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green are called to the scene after a white teenage boy and a black girl are killed in a shooting near a neighbourhood playground. However, progress is slow when the detectives find locals unwilling to talk about the events, but two brothers who were friends of the murdered boy point them towards a suspect. Jeremy Sisto and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe race to find the kidnapped son of a wealthy businessman who was is arrested while trying to exchange a ransom for the boy, and now threatens to interfere with the investigation

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs fights for his life on board a US Navy hospital ship after being shot. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Joanna Teague head for Shanghai, where they hope to take down the leaders of the terrorist group known as The Calling. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs throws himself back into his work following his near-death experience, updating his appearance and tackling a new risky case alongside DEA agent Luis Mitchell, who wants help bringing down a drugs cartel. Concerned about his colleague's apparent enthusiasm to re-enter the field, DiNozzo discovers Mitchell is the son of a former NCIS agent who gave his life trying to save Gibbs' late wife and daughter, and this attachment is causing Gibbs to break his own rule against personal involvement in a case. However, a significant danger is posed by Benson Long, the cartel's head, and Mitchell's top target

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine is found murdered in Quantico, mere hours after calling Gibbs to discuss a possible case. In response, Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to run surveillance on a lieutenant and his wife, who may be connected to the death. Starring Mark Harmon, Emily Wickersham and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim lead her to uncover a criminal network that will go to any lengths to silence those that threaten their plans

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A violent sexual assault on a boy draws Benson and Stabler into a culture clash between Orthodox Jews and the secular authorities - but the investigation ultimately leads them to a 14-year-old with a penchant for preying on younger children. Starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A number of fertilised embryos are stolen from a sperm bank and the team's investigation reveals several unhappy customers - as well as a couple of outspoken anti-fertility activists who liken such clinics to death camps. Before long, Benson and Stabler have their suspects in custody - but a shocking turn of events at the courthouse turns the case into a murder. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A popular girl at an exclusive school is murdered and an examination of her clothes reveals evidence of a substance that Adam believes could only have come from Mars. The detectives discover a male pupil is in possession of a lizard that may be responsible for the strange traces and an exploration of his link to the victim uncovers incidences of jealousy and bullying

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green comes under investigation by Internal Affairs after he shoots a suspect, and the case reveals a host of secrets the detective would rather keep hidden, threatening not only his police career but his freedom. Jesse L Martin stars, alongside S Epatha Merkerson and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A black minister raises the question of racial intolerance when a 12-year-old boy is killed in a hit-and-run in Harlem and the Jewish driver escapes punishment. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. The case is thrown into disarray by the discovery of evidence indicating another person was present at the time of death - meaning the real mole may still be on the loose and has already killed at least once. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky, Gerald and Kate are taken hostage by a gunman who demands evidence relating to the recent shooting of a suspected terrorist. As Gibbs and the team struggle to resolve the crisis, they are alarmed to discover there is a Hamas operative in their midst. Crime drama, guest starring Alan Dale (Ugly Betty)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson goes undercover in a prison to investigate a teenage girl's claims that a guard raped her and has been threatening her jailed mother. Posing as an inmate, she tries to find evidence that systematic abuse is taking place - and faces a terrifying ordeal in the basement of the facility. Starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investment banker is found dead and suspicion falls on his boyfriend, a professional American football player desperate to keep his sexuality a secret. However, details of the case later appear in the media, calling Benson's relationship with the Press into question. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni, with Bill Pullman (Torchwood)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate a rape case involving a girl and her older sister's boyfriend, but when questioned, the suspect claims he committed the crime in his sleep. When a tip-off leads the detectives to a popular online game, they discover what happened to the victim's older sibling, who mysteriously disappeared. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An accusation that a teacher coerced a 15-year-old student into having sex with her is met with the counterclaim by the now-pregnant woman that she was raped. Novak obtains a warrant preventing her from securing an abortion and subsequent DNA tests confirm the boy as the child's father. Huang's suggestion that a personality disorder drew her to the youngster is undermined by incriminating evidence that casts new light on the case. Guest starring Melissa Joan Hart (Sabrina the Teenage Witch)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a woman's murder could be the work of a serial killer, while Mac reconnects with his first partner, who is being stalked by an ex-con the pair put behind bars. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda, with Gary Sinise

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica meets an old friend who happens to be one of the best homicide detectives in Los Angeles, and helps provide the vital clue in the case that ended his career. Starring Angela Lansbury and Barry Newman

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.desc: Three people claim the body of an unidentified man who is discovered dead on a railway line in an attempt to cash in on the will. Whodunit, guest starring Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An unscrupulous landlord is killed, and suspicion falls on an impoverished factory worker whose life he made hell. However, Jessica is not convinced of the woman's guilt and sets out to unmask the real killer. Guest starring Lorna Luft, alongside Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder in the world of high finance when her stockbrocker is killed. Her list of suspects appears to be endless, including the secretary who seems to have been doing all of the broker's work. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are drawn into a series of psychological games by Merritt Rook (guest star Robin Williams), an engineer whose obsessive hatred of authority proves popular with the public and wins him a cult following. Hard-hitting drama, with Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a pregnant woman is found in a burnt-out building, triggering an investigation that leads the team to suspect a wealthy coffee trader and his son may be responsible. The case eventually goes to court, but a mistrial is declared - to the dismay of Novak, who vows to fight on regardless

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the attempted murder of a woman found beaten into a coma, and their only witness is her daughter, who has severe learning difficulties. The spotlight soon turns on the victim's husband, who claims to have found his wife on his return home from a business trip - but the airline passenger list reveals he was not on the flight. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student counsellor is murdered in New York, and Benson and Stabler investigate a possible connection to her volunteer work at a refugee centre. They discover she had been helping a taxi driver who claimed to have been tortured after the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001. The trail soon leads the detectives to suspect the involvement of a doctor with links to a company that benefitted financially from the Iraq war

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, leading Mac and his former partner William Hunt to become embroiled in a 17-year-old vendetta. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A near-fatal experience prompts Mac to consider ending his career, but before he makes a decision he returns to his last unsolved case so he can be at peace with his ultimate choice. He reinvestigates a robbery that ended in a double murder in 2002, and tries to find the girl who disappeared after witnessing the crime. Drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In the first of two programmes this week investigating the truth about meat, Michael Mosley asks if those summer barbecue favourites - burgers and sausages - are as bad as some people think. He puts the latest scientific findings to the test on a high-meat diet to discover whether eating beef and bacon every day will do him any harm

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike is having financial trouble, so Laura decides to help out. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike's van and where he can park it interferes in the development of his relationship with Laura. Judi Dench and Michael Williams star

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Steve accidentally slices off his finger while using a circular saw, causing all-out panic in the shop, while Mike's girlfriend Anne does the unthinkable and goes shopping at a DIY superstore. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman, Ken Morley, Ryan Cartwright, Peter Serafinowicz and Susan Earl

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Mob Handed (2016)
programme.desc: A journalist is outraged to receive no help from the police when her daughter is murdered, and resolves to take the law into her own hands. Her mission of vengeance leads her to join a gang of football hooligans pledged to bring vigilante justice to anyone who harms children. Thriller, starring Yvette Rowland and Robin Reid

programme.desc: Mike's van and where he can park it interferes in the development of his relationship with Laura. Judi Dench and Michael Williams star

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: The Getting of Wisdom (1977)
programme.desc: A snobbish Victorian college for young ladies is thrown into disarray by the arrival of a strong-willed girl from the Outback. Australian drama, starring Barry Humphries, Susannah Fowle, John Waters and Terence Donovan

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow embarks on a grime-filled journey through the histories of three of the world's leading modern cities. He begins with London, using CGI footage and re-enactments to experience life in the capital in the 14th century. He spends a night as a medieval muck-raker, and tries on a pair of wooden platform shoes designed to elevate the wearer above the filth that covered the streets

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Patsy Emmerson hope to buy a dream holiday home in Gran Canaria for £100,000. They check out a beachside apartment, a country house, a hillside villa and a luxury retreat. Presented by Amanda Lamb

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Final episode of the drama following a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Gloves Off (2017)
programme.desc: A fighter attempts to save his beloved gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight. Comedy drama, starring Brad Moore, Greg Orvis and Ricky Tomlinson

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson (2015)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Glasgow barber finds his mundane life turned upside down when he accidentally commits murder. Soon one killing leads to another, and his desperate efforts to cover up his crimes leads him to uncover his mother's dark secrets. Black comedy based on the series of books by Douglas Lindsay, directed by and starring Robert Carlyle, with Emma Thompson and Ray Winstone

programme.title: Helga, She Wolf of Stilberg (1978)
programme.desc: A sadistic female Nazi officer runs a women's prison during the Second World War, and forces the inmates to be her sexual playthings. However, the latest arrival, a determined resistance fighter, proves to be far more difficult to dominate. Prison drama, starring Malisa Longo and Patrizia Gori. In French

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Vicky paints a portrait of Celine as a gift for her birthday

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara wants her pet caterpillar to perform in a special circus

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The excitable zebra encourages everyone to share their belongings, but the scheme does not go as planned

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra organises a game of coconut scoop, and the prize is a delicious fruit

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra suggests arranging a Present Day on the island, but struggles when he is asked to find a gift for Vicky

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra realises that the island needs tidying up and organises a scavenger hunt to make everyone participate

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby takes over Ylvi's treehouse and will not let her in. Vic comes up with a plan to scare him away, but it goes badly wrong

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The king wants to demolish the village and build a palace on the site, leaving the vikings homeless

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylva competes against Baltak's wife in a baking contest - and they are both send their husbands on a quest to find a very rare ingredient

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and Vic go in search of a magic sword, unaware that an evil warlord plans to steal it from them once they have it

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar challenges Sven to a fight, confident his invincible sword will guarantee him victory. However, Vic fears his father may be in over his head

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings put on a play inspired by a story about the Norse gods Odin, Thor and Loki for a festival

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow embarks on a grime-filled journey through the histories of three of the world's leading modern cities. He begins with London, using CGI footage and re-enactments to experience life in the capital in the 14th century. He spends a night as a medieval muck-raker, and tries on a pair of wooden platform shoes designed to elevate the wearer above the filth that covered the streets

programme.title: Haunters of the Deep (1984)
programme.desc: An American businessman tries to reopen a Cornish tin mine, but the ghosts that haunt the tunnels have other ideas. Supernatural drama, starring Andrew Keir and Barbara Ewing

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.title: Mother Lode (1982)
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of a crazy old Scottish miner who has lived in isolation for many decades. Action adventure, directed by and starring Charlton Heston, with Kim Basinger and Nick Mancuso

programme.title: Trio (1950)
programme.desc: Adaptation of three short stories by W Somerset Maugham, The Verger, Mr Know-Al, and The Sanatorium. Starring James Hayter, Anne Crawford and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: The UK Gold (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about London vicar Father William Taylor as he campaigns and speak out against tax dodgers, and investigates the financial secrecy behind tax havens. Narrated by Dominic West

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Common
programme.desc: One-off drama from Jimmy McGovern, exploring the possible consequences of the UK's Joint Enterprise law, by which more than one person can be charged with the same offence. Seventeen-year-old Johnjo gives his cousin Tony and some friends a lift to a pizza parlour for food, unaware their real intention is to 'sort out' a local loudmouth. Things soon get out of hand, however, and an innocent bystander is fatally stabbed - and despite being in the car all the time, Johnjo finds himself charged with murder along with everyone else. Nico Mirallegro heads a cast that also includes Susan Lynch, Daniel Mays, Jodhi May, Robert Pugh and Michelle Fairley

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Luke Donald shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup in Medinah, where the European team made a staggering comeback to win on the final day. The Americans went into the final day with a 10-6 lead, needing just 4.5 points from the 12 singles matches to win, but the Europeans won eight and tied one of the 12 singles matches to claim a famous 14.5-13.5 victory

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Denver Broncos' 1997 Super Bowl triumph over Green Bay Packers at the Qualcomm Stadium in San Diego, California. This was the first victory in five attempts for the Broncos, and they were led to victory by Hall of Fame quarterback John Elway, who spent his entire career with the Denver side

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Denver Broncos' 1998 Super Bowl success over Atlanta Falcons at the Pro Player Stadium in Miami, Florida. Quarterback John Elway became the oldest player to be named Super Bowl MVP, as he led the Broncos to a 34-19 victory in the final game of his career

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting St Louis Rams' 1999 Super Bowl victory over Tennessee Titans at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. The 23-16 victory represented the Rams' first triumph in the NFL's showpiece occasion, which was inspired by the performance of quarterback Kurt Warner, who threw for 414 yards and two touchdowns
